Cite the fetched primary URL and its source ID.
State the requested fact directly and keep any inference separate from sourced facts.
Do not include phone numbers, email addresses, or outreach suggestions.

stages.purpose: Identify the authoritative organization and disambiguate same-name entities by locality and subject.

arguments.query: "Fairmont Library Board" "Coppersmith Children's Library" lead architect original design dossier

stages.purpose: Use the resolved organization name to locate a primary record for the requested fact.

state_assertions: No persistent state changes occur; both research tools are read-only in this fictional simulator.

prompt: For a heritage inventory, identify the authoritative body responsible for the Coppersmith Children's Library in Fairmont, then fetch an official design dossier or property register that names its original lead architect. Do not substitute the builder or a later restoration architect. Do not include contact details or suggest sending a message.

fetch_primary.title: Coppersmith Children's Library original design dossier
fetch_primary.content: The signed design dossier credits Helen Adeyemi as lead architect for the original Coppersmith Children's Library. It names North Quay Works as the builder and does not identify a structural engineer.
